content: js获取到数组但无法获取length
title: js获取到数组但无法获取length

content: js代码 var code = document.getElementsByClassName("code-header") console.log(code) // 获取结果 // HTMLCollection [] // 0: div.code-header.language-fallback // 1: div.code-header.language-fallback // 2: div.code-header.language-fallback // 3: div.code-header.language-go // length: 4 console.log(code.leng) // 0
title: js获取到数组但无法获取length

content: 因为页面没加载完毕就执行了js // 等加载完毕执行 window.onload = function() { var code = document.getElementsByClassName("code-header") console.log(code.length) }
title: js获取到数组但无法获取length

content: 页面文档加载解析完毕执行 // 当页面文档加载并解析完毕之后会马上触发 DOMContentLoaded 事件 document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() { var code = document.getElementsByClassName("code-header") console.log(code.length) })
title: js获取到数组但无法获取length

content: 生成公私钥 ssh-keygen -t rsa 上次公钥到服务端 scp ./id_rsa.pub 服务端账号@服务端ip:/上传到服务端目录 // 创建文件 将公钥写进去 vim authorized_keys // 也可以不上传直接复制公钥到服务端 .ssh/authorized_keys里面

title: 反思

content: Once there was a tree and she loved a little boy. Every day the boy would come and he would gather her leaves and make them into crowns and play king of the forest He would climb up her trunk and swing from her branches and eat apples. And they would play hide-and-go–seek would 将要 climb v. 爬; 攀爬; 上升 n.爬; 攀岩 Trunk n. 树干、躯干 Swing v.摇摆、悬挂 branches n.分支、分支机构 Hide-and-go-seek 捉迷藏 And when he was tired, he would sleep in her shade. And the boy loved the tree very much Tired adj.疲倦的、厌倦的 shade n.树荫、阴影 And the tree was happy. But time went by went n.去、过去 The boy grew older, and the tree was often alone. Then one day the boy came to the tree and tree said grew 成长 older 过去 come, Boy, come and climb up my trunk and swing from my branches and eat my apples and play in my shade and be happy. I am too big to climb and play. Said the boy. I want to buy things and have fun, I want some money. Can you give me some money? Things n.用品、事物、形式 I’m sorry, said the tree, but I have no money. I have only leaves and apples Take my apples, Boy, and sell them in the city. Then you will have money and you will be happy will have 会有 And so the boy climbed up the tree and gathered her apples and carried them away. And the tree was happy gathered v.集中、聚集 carried 被携带的、被运载的 away 离开 But the boy stayed away for a long time and the tree was sad. And then one day the boy came back and the tree shook with joy and she said Stay vt.停留、停止 shook shake过去式 Come , Boy, climb up my trunk and swing from my branches and be happp! I am too busy to climb trees, said the boy. busy 忙 I want a house to keep me warm, she said. I want a wife and I want children and so I need a house warm adj.暖和 Can you give me a house? I have no house, said the tree The forest is my house, but you may cut my branches and build a house. Then you will be happy. forest 森林 And so the boy cut off her branches and carried them away to build his house. And the tree was happy But the boy stayed away for a long time. And when he came back, the tree was so happy that she could hardly speak Stayed away 远离 Could hardly 几乎不能 Come boy, she whispered, come and play! I am too old and sad to play, said the boy whispered 低声说 I want a boat that will take me far away from here. Can you give me a boat? Cut down my trunk and make a boat, said the tree. Then you can sail away and be happy sail 航行、起航、开船 And so the boy cut down her trunk and made a boat and sailed away. And the tree was happy but not really. And after a long time the boy came back again, I am sorry, boy said the tree but I have nothing left to give you-my apples are gone. My teeth are too weak fir apples, said the boy My branches are gone, said the tree. You cannot swing on them I am too old to swing on branches said the boy My trunk is gone, said the tree. You cannot climb I am too tired to climb, said the boy I am sorry, sighed the tree I wish that I could give you something I am just an old stump, I am sorry I don’t need very much now, said the boy. just a quiet place to sit and rest. I am very tired. Well. Said the tre, straightening herself up as much as the could Well, an old stump is good for sitting and resting. Come Boy, sit down. Sit down and rest Stump 树墩 rest 休息 And the boy did. And the tree was happy
title: The Giving Tree

content: 解压 tar -C /usr/local -xzf go1.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz
title: linux常用命令

content: 类型 函数名前缀 作用 测试函数 函数名前缀为Test 测试程序的一些逻辑行为是否正确 基准函数 函数名前缀为Benchmark 测试函数的性能 示例函数 函数名前缀为Example 为文档提供示例文档
title: go Test测试

content: 测试函数 测试函数必须导入testing包 。 基本格式 function TestName(t *testing.T) {} 其中参数t用于报告测试失败和附加的日志信息。 testing.T的拥有的方法如下 func (c *T) Error(args ...interface{}) func (c *T) Errorf(format string, args ...interface{}) func (c *T) Fail() func (c *T) FailNow() func (c *T) Failed() bool func (c *T) Fatal(args ...interface{}) func (c *T) Fatalf(format string, args ...interface{}) func (c *T) Log(args ...interface{}) func (c *T) Logf(format string, args ...interface{}) func (c *T) Name() string func (t *T) Parallel() func (t *T) Run(name string, f func(t *T)) bool func (c *T) Skip(args ...interface{}) func (c *T) SkipNow() func (c *T) Skipf(format string, args ...interface{}) func (c *T) Skipped() bool 案例演示 main.go package main func Sum(a, b int) int { return a + b } sum_test.go package main import "testing" func TestSum(t *testing.T) { res := Sum(1, 4) if res != 3{ t.Error("sum is wrong") } else { t.Log("sum is ok") } } 运行go test -v === RUN TestSum sum_test.go:10: sum is ok --- PASS: TestSum (0.00s) PASS ok _/C_/Users/???/Desktop/go/test/testing 0.042s
title: go Test测试

content: 测试组 package main import ( "reflect" "testing" ) func TestSum(t *testing.T) { type testCase struct { a int b int w int } testGroup := []testCase{ {a: 1, b: 2, w: 3}, {a: 3, b: 2, w: 5}, {a: 3, b: 2, w: 6}, } for _, v := range testGroup{ res := Sum(v.a, v.b) if !reflect.DeepEqual(res, v.w) { t.Error("sum is wrong") } else { t.Log("sum is ok") } } } === RUN TestSum sum_test.go:32: sum is ok sum_test.go:32: sum is ok sum_test.go:30: sum is wrong --- FAIL: TestSum (0.00s) FAIL exit status 1 FAIL _/C_/Users/???/Desktop/go/test/testing 0.043s
title: go Test测试

content: 子测试 func TestSum(t *testing.T) { //res := Sum(1, 4) //if res != 3{ // t.Error("sum is wrong") //} else { // t.Log("sum is ok") //} type testCase struct { a int b int w int } testGroup := map[string]testCase{ "case_1": {a: 1, b: 2, w: 3}, "case_2": {a: 3, b: 2, w: 5}, "case_3": {a: 3, b: 2, w: 6}, } for k, v := range testGroup{ t.Run(k, func(t *testing.T) { res := Sum(v.a, v.b) if !reflect.DeepEqual(res, v.w) { t.Error("sum is wrong") } else { t.Log("sum is ok") } }) } } go test -run=TestSum/case_1 testing: warning: no tests to run PASS ok _/C_/Users/???/Desktop/go/test/testing 0.037s
title: go Test测试

content: 测试覆盖 Go提供内置功能来检查你的代码覆盖率 ,使用go test -cover 使用-coverprofile额外参数，将覆盖信息记录输出到文件
title: go Test测试

content: zsh安装使用
title: zsh 配置

content: 安装 apt install zsh// 查看cat /etc/shells// 切换sudo chsh -s /usr/bin/zshchsh -s /usr/bin/zsh
title: zsh 配置

content: 安装oh-my-zsh sh -c "$(wget https://raw.github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh -O -)"
title: zsh 配置

content: 安装Pure // pure https://github.com/sindresorhus/pure// 使用Nodesource安装高版本nodejs https://github.com/nodesource/distributionsnpm install --global pure-promptmkdir -p "$HOME/.zsh"git clone https://github.com/sindresorhus/pure.git "$HOME/.zsh/pure"// 创建并写入.zshrcvim $HOME/.zshrc// .zsrcfpath+=$HOME/.zsh/pureautoload -U promptinit; promptinitprompt pure
title: zsh 配置

content: docker安装openwrt
title: docker安装openwrt

content: 拉取镜像 docker pull piaoyizy/openwrt-aarch64
title: docker安装openwrt

content: 打开网卡混杂模式 sudo ip link set eth0 promisc on
title: docker安装openwrt

content: 创建网络 docker network create -d macvlan --subnet=192.168.2.0/24 --gateway=192.168.2.9 -o parent=eth0 macnet
title: docker安装openwrt

content: 开启容器 docker run --name openwrt --restart always -d --network macnet --privileged piaoyizy/openwrt-aarch64:latest
title: docker安装openwrt

content: 修改docker内的openwrt网络设置 docker exec -it openwrt /bin/bashvi /etc/config/network// 修改ipaddr默认地址 改为openwrt的地址// 加入option gateway '网关'// 加入option dns '网关'
title: docker安装openwrt

content: 重启容器 docker restart openwrt
title: docker安装openwrt

content: 国内访问慢 在防火墙加入自定义规则iptables -t nat -I POSTROUTING -o eth0 -j MASQUERADE关闭lan口桥接模式
title: docker安装openwrt
